description: Introduction to Sociology Meaning, Benefits, Career Opportunities & Why You Should Study It Introduction to Sociology Sociology is the systematic study of society, social relationships, institutions, and patterns of human behaviour. It examines how individuals interact with groups, communities, and institutions such as family, religion, economy, and government.
